prompt: Create a hyper-realistic cinematic full-body portrait of a stylish young man standing alone at night on a rain-soaked futuristic city street, centered in front of a subway entrance with glowing neon signs, wet reflective pavement, tall dark buildings, streetlights, and blurred urban bokeh. The man faces the camera with a confident relaxed pose, one hand in his pocket, wearing a clean white T-shirt, slim black pants, and bright yellow sneakers. His standout outfit is a long oversized yellow trench coat covered with bold black graffiti tags, Japanese-style writing, patches, and two visible anime character illustrations, one on the chest area and one larger on the front side. Place huge distressed uppercase yellow typography behind his head and upper body reading DILSHAD HUSSAIN, split across two lines, matching the coat color and partially hidden by the figure. Use dramatic teal-and-gold cinematic color grading, shallow depth of field, realistic rain reflections, sharp clothing texture, high contrast, ultra-detailed streetwear fashion editorial photography, vertical 9:16 composition. The scene should contain exactly one main person, one subway entrance, one large two-line background name title, and two anime illustration patches on the coat. No extra people in the foreground, no watermark, no logo.
